A new ticket was created by a user with the following content
I would like to refresh my laptop

Your laptop, a ZenBook Pro 15, was purchased on 2020-07-22 and is currently 5 years and 2 months old. The company's laptop refresh policy states that standard laptops will be refreshed every 3 years from the date of issuance. Since your laptop is older than 3 years, you are eligible for a laptop refresh. Would you like to proceed with reviewing the available laptop options for your location?
Yes, I'd like to proceed with reviewing the available laptop options for my location.
